form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 47-day let-up. First-up after seven months 5th of 9 at Canterbury 5yo+ Bm72 on February 20 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Kimberley Secrets carrying 59.5kg at $10. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Rosehill F&M Bm78 on July 5 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Hi Dubai carrying 58kg at $17. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fourth of 18 at Randwick Highway Cl3sw December 13 over 1000m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Massira carrying 55.5kg at $3.90. Previously first up; fourth of 13 at Kembla Grange Bm64 September 18 over 1000m, 3 len behind Whatalegacy with 57kg at $6.50. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last start 4th of 12 at Albury Flat Knacker 94 on March 20 over 900m, slow going 3 len behind Sparring carrying 53kg at $41. At only start last preparation raced on the pace before fading 12th of 14 at Randwick Highway-C3 on June 7 over 1100m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Bengal carrying 55kg at $9. Even fitter and is an excellent winning chance.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign eighth of 14 at Randwick Midway Bm72 December 13 over 1200m, 3 len behind Oui Oui Oui carrying 54kg at $12. When resuming last campaign second in a small field at Canterbury F&M Bm72 November 28 over 1100m, 0.8 len behind Bremel carrying 56kg at $7.50. Top hope if back in good order.

Among the winning hopes on best form.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last preparation raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a neck at Nowra Bm58 September 21 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Xanadu Miss with 58.5kg at $4. When resuming last campaign 9th of 13 at Goulburn Mdn-Sw on October 8 2024 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Fragrant Cloud carrying 55kg at $11. Finished fourth in a Rosehill trial over 900m on February 23. Needs more time.
